# garganttua-events-connector-bus

## Description

In-memory event-bus connector (`BusConnector`) backed by BigQueue. Extends `AbstractLifecycle` and
implements `IConnector`. Suitable for testing and single-process deployments where no external
broker is required.

## Installation

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED-START -->
### Installation with Maven
```xml
<dependency>
    <groupId>com.garganttua</groupId>
    <artifactId>garganttua-events-connector-bus</artifactId>
    <version>3.0.0-ALPHA04</version>
</dependency>
```

### Actual version
3.0.0-ALPHA04

### Dependencies
 - `com.garganttua:garganttua-events-api`
 - `com.garganttua.core:garganttua-commons`
 - `com.garganttua.core:garganttua-lifecycle`
 - `com.leansoft:bigqueue`
 - `org.projectlombok:lombok`
 - `org.slf4j:slf4j-api`

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED-END -->
